faq.title: Curious? We Got Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything needed to kickstart the journey and stop the guesswork.

questions.a: RabaLaba is a professional financial research terminal for multi asset analysis, featuring rule based signals and real time data.

questions.q: Is the terminal free to use?
questions.a: RabaLaba offers the '$t(subscription.plans.basic.name)' tier is free for basic research. For advanced features, the '$t(subscription.plans.professional.name)' and '$t(subscription.plans.ultimate.name)' tier for professional.
We source our data from institutional grade providers like Yahoo Finance and other trusted giants. It is real time and credible.

questions.q: Is the sign up process quick?
questions.a: Create an account in seconds with a valid email for full access. Verification is instant so market research starts right away.

hero.subtitle: The top tier class of market analysis for Indonesia Stocks, US Stocks, Crypto, Commodities, and Forex. Accurate signals, zero noise, infinite money glitch.

features.title: Main Features
features.subtitle: The Ultimate Kit to
features.description: High impact research terminal built for those who value data over FOMO.

multi_asset.title: Multi Asset Research
multi_asset.description: Monitor Indonesia stocks, US stocks, crypto, commodities, and forex in one screen. Instant execution.

sentiment.title: Long/Short Sentiment
sentiment.description: Analyze rule based buy and sell signals with transparent signal strength scores, decision support not predictions. Let the data speak for itself.

trading_plan.title: Trading Plan Setup
trading_plan.description: Get auto generated entry, stop loss, and take profit levels with precision. Master plan and execute trades with ease.

volume.title: Volume Analysis
volume.description: Detect whale movements through significant spikes in trading volume. Confirm market trends with real time data not just vibes.

calendar.title: Economic Calendar
calendar.description: Track major global economic events that trigger market volatility. Stay updated on CPI, FOMC, and high impact news to keep edge.

fear_greed.title: Fear & Greed Monitor
fear_greed.description: Track market psychology with our Fear & Greed Index. Buy when others are fearful, and sell when they get greedy.

dialog.not_enough_data: Not enough data to compute signal. Try a different asset.

dialog.suppressed_note: A strong {{tier}}-tier directional lean was held to NEUTRAL by the no-trade filter ({{reason}}). The conviction is real, but conditions don't favor entering yet.
dialog.bt_note: Walk forward simulation on past candles only. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
dialog.bt_insufficient: Not enough price history to run a backtest yet.

dialog.sm_unavailable_desc: Binance derivatives data didn't load, likely because the exchange is blocked on this network. Positioning gets skipped from this signal. Switching to a VPN or another DNS usually sorts it out.

dialog.crypto_context_desc: BTC is {{riskState}} (score {{score}}), {{flow}}. Most alt coins are leveraged beta to BTC, so {{signal}} here is {{alignment}}.
dialog.us_context_desc: S&P 500 is {{riskState}} (score {{score}}{{vix}}). US stocks follow the index, so {{signal}} here is {{alignment}}.

disclaimer.title: Know The Risks
disclaimer.description: The RabaLaba Research Terminal provides high octane intel, but please note these essential rules:
points: Not financial advice, just pure data and research. Always do due diligence.
The pilot is in control, the terminal is the radar. All trading decisions and risks belong to the user alone.
Use cold capital only. Never trade with essential funds like rent or daily needs.
Market volatility is real. Stay disciplined and keep emotions in check.
This terminal is for perpetual derivative contracts, adjust if it does not fit your needs.
disclaimer.confirm: I have read and understood the risk disclosure
disclaimer.toast_success: System locked in. Welcome to the Command Center!
